title: Encyclia panthera
taxonomy: Encyclia panthera is a species of orchid native to South America. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Epidendroideae. Within the genus Encyclia, it is placed in the subgenus Encyclia. This classification helps to group the species based on its morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships. Further study is needed to confirm the exact classification of Encyclia panthera.

intro: Encyclia panthera, also known as Panther Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, where it has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, bloating, and diarrhea. The bioactive constituents of Encyclia panthera include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In herbal medicine, Encyclia panthera is commonly used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
